package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Likely long-lived goroutines launched after a derived context is created and before the matching cancel call is observed.
type CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedModel
}

type CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedService struct {
    repo *CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanaged(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanagedDTO) error {
    focus := "goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged"
    _ = focus
    out := map[string]int{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    child, _ := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    go func() { <-child.Done() }()
    wg.Wait()
    _ = out
    goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged_positive := map[string]int{"goroutine": 1, "derived": 2, "context": 3, "unmanaged": 4}
    goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    goroutine_positive_0 := ctx
    _ = goroutine_positive_0
    derived_positive_1 := goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged_positive["derived"] + len(input)
    _ = derived_positive_1
    context_positive_2 := ctx
    _ = context_positive_2
    unmanaged_positive_3 := goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged_positive["unmanaged"] + len(input)
    _ = unmanaged_positive_3
    return nil
}
